name: MAGEN: NARAKUMI NO JUTSU (DEMONIC MIRAGE: LIVING HELL TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 3 (Spell Level 2)

Chakra Cost: 4

Learn DC: 16 | Successes: 2

Perform: 4 | Perform DC: 16

Components: C, H

You describe an illusion to show to the subject, which has an effect based on how the subject would feel about the illusion (and thus how well you know them):

Indifference: The subject simply doesn't care and remains unaffected.

Repulsed: The subject despises or is slightly frightened, it is @Condition[shaken]{shaken} for 1d3 rounds.

Fear (Weak): If the subject is even slightly afraid of the illusion, it is @Condition[dazed]{dazed} for 1d4 rounds. This is often a minor phobia or a source of fear from its childhood.

Fear (Strong): If the subject is very afraid of the illusion, it is @Condition[panicked]{panicked} for 1d3 rounds. This could be a tormentor or serial killer, for example.

Fear (Overwhelming): If the subject is completely terrified, it suffers a short but serious nervous overload and becomes @Condition[unconscious]{unconscious} for 1d3 rounds. The illusion would usually involve someone the subject holds dear.

If the target succeeds at their save, they are instead @Condition[cowering;duration=1]{cowering} for 1 round.
